nasb.text: You took some of your clothes, made for yourself high places of various colors and played the harlot on them, which should never come about nor happen.

esv.text: You took some of your garments and made for yourself colorful shrines, and on them played the whore. The like has never been, nor ever shall be.

cnv.text: 你拿了你的一些衣服，為自己建造色彩繽紛的邱壇，又在那裡行淫。這樣的事不應發生，將來也不會再出現。

ccb.text: 你用自己的衣服在拜偶像的地方结彩，在那里行淫。这样的事真是空前绝后！
